ns0:entry.ns0:title: Andyyyy64/whichllm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Andyyyy64/whichllm
Language: python
Find the local LLM that actually runs and performs best on your hardware. Ranked by real, recency-aware benchmarks, not parameter count. One command, run it instantly.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MemPalace/mempalace
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MemPalace/mempalace
Language: python
The best-benchmarked open-source AI memory system. And it's free.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Panniantong/Agent-Reach
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Panniantong/Agent-Reach
Language: python
Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: RyanCodrai/turbovec
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/RyanCodrai/turbovec
Language: python
A vector index built on TurboQuant, written in Rust with Python bindings

ns0:entry.ns0:title: anthropics/claude-code-security-review
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-security-review
Language: python
An AI-powered security review GitHub Action using Claude to analyze code changes for security vulnerabilities.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: anthropics/knowledge-work-plugins
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/anthropics/knowledge-work-plugins
Language: python
Open source repository of plugins primarily intended for knowledge workers to use in Claude Cowork

ns0:entry.ns0:title: francescopace/espectre
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/francescopace/espectre
Language: python
🛜 ESPectre 👻 - Motion detection system based on Wi-Fi spectre analysis (CSI), with Home Assistant integration.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google/skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google/skills
Language: python
Agent Skills for Google products and technologies

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jianchang512/pyvideotrans
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jianchang512/pyvideotrans
Language: python
Translate the video from one language to another and embed dubbing & subtitles.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mvanhorn/last30days-skill
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mvanhorn/last30days-skill
Language: python
AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary

ns0:entry.ns0:title: roboflow/supervision
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/roboflow/supervision
Language: python
We write your reusable computer vision tools. 💜

ns0:entry.ns0:title: shareAI-lab/learn-claude-code
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/shareAI-lab/learn-claude-code
Language: python
Bash is all you need - A nano claude code–like 「agent harness」, built from 0 to 1

ns0:entry.ns0:title: wanshuiyin/Auto-claude-code-research-in-sleep
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/wanshuiyin/Auto-claude-code-research-in-sleep
Language: python
ARIS ⚔️ (Auto-Research-In-Sleep) — Lightweight Markdown-only skills for autonomous ML research: cross-model review loops, idea discovery, and experiment automation. No framework, no lock-in — works with Claude Code, Codex, OpenClaw, or any LLM agent.
